## Summary

Describe the change in 1 to 3 short sentences.

## Why This Change

Explain the maintainer problem this improves.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Template content refinement
- [ ] New template
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Compatibility update for current `gh-aw`
- [ ] Repository maintenance only

## Validation

Paste the command(s) you ran and the result.

Example:

```bash
gh aw validate --dir templates/security
```

## Required Checks

- [ ] I re-checked the current public `gh-aw` docs before changing compatibility-sensitive behavior
- [ ] I only changed files that are relevant to this repository
- [ ] I did not add internal notes, machine-specific details, or private process files
- [ ] I kept permissions narrow and used `safe-outputs` for write actions where needed
- [ ] I updated `README.md` or `CHANGELOG.md` if public behavior changed

## Maintainer Notes

Anything you want the maintainer to focus on.
